tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The laboratory results show an elevated HbA1c (6.4%), indicating impaired glucose regulation consistent with prediabetes or early diabetes, despite a normal fasting glucose. Renal function (urea, creatinine), electrolytes, and calcium are within normal limits. Recommend clinical correlation and consideration of further evaluation or intervention for glycemic control.

text.div: Provider Organization: Facharzt für Allgemeinmedizin Johann Holbach
Provenance for SYNDERAI Synthetic Example Data Resource
Laboratory: Laboratoire Central Européenne, 1000 Brussels, Belgium
